channel.title: Chronicles of a Millennial Techie
channel.description: Insights on personal growth, tech, career development, mental health, LGBTQ+ and minority issues in modern life.

item.title: When Pride Becomes Performance: Why Some of Us Have Complex Feelings About Gay Community
item.description: Why being lectured about Pride history by the same people who have consistently marginalized you feels particularly hollow.

item.title: Quantum Computing: How Your Passwords Became Obsolete Overnight
item.description: Quantum computing promises incredible power but might destroy the digital security we depend on. Here's how this tech works and why you should pay attention.

item.title: My Own Naw Ruz: Finding Growth in New Beginnings
item.description: This Naw Ruz marks more than spring, it marks a fresh start, reclaiming myself after years of feeling paused.

item.title: Immigration: The Truth Behind the Divide
item.description: A balanced look at the immigration debate, exploring its history, economic implications, and modern challenges.

item.title: 17 Reasons Trump's Next Term Could Leave Us Trumped
item.description: Examining 17 key areas where Donald Trump's proposed policies could reshape the nation—and bring about sweeping changes for the future of America.

item.title: π0 (Pi-Zero) and the Dawn of Truly Intelligent Machines
item.description: π0 (Pi-Zero) blurs the line between human capability and machine precision. But are we ready for it?

item.title: The Heartbreak of the 2024 Election
item.description: A personal and informative reflection on feeling betrayed by the election results and questioning the values we hold dear as a society.

item.title: Why Does Every Rejection Feel Harder Than It Should?
item.description: An honest reflection on the emotional toll of repeated rejection and the deep exhaustion that follows.

item.title: Growing Up Gay: How Early Rejection and Acceptance Shaped My Identity
item.description: A candid reflection on early experiences as a gay Asian man, exploring culture, community, and self-discovery during my college years.

item.title: Exploring M&A: Is This My Next Big Step in Entrepreneurship?
item.description: After years of supporting small business owners, exploring mergers and acquisitions presents an opportunity to make a direct impact, especially in minority and LGBTQ+ communities.

item.title: 10 Invalidating Phrases in Relationships: Why They Hurt and What to Say Instead
item.description: Drawing from personal experience, this highlights 10 common invalidating phrases that can damage relationships and offers alternatives for healthier communication.

item.title: How Much Influence Do Corporations Have Over Our Government?
item.description: Corporations and government—two powerful entities that shape our daily lives. But how much sway do big businesses really have over the laws and policies meant to serve the public?

item.title: What Happens When the Need to Please Others Undermines Your Self-Worth?
item.description: Discover how the journey from a middle school people-pleaser to a self-advocate has shaped relationships, self-worth, and outlook on life.

item.title: The State of the Economy: What's Next for the U.S.?
item.description: The U.S. economy is facing significant fluctuations, with recent stock market drops and a mixed jobs report highlighting potential challenges and uncertainties ahead.

item.title: What Moving to Austin Taught Me About Friendship, Family, and Self-Growth
item.description: Moving to Austin, TX, was meant to be a fresh start. Instead, it turned into a journey of unexpected challenges and profound lessons about friendship, family, and personal growth.

item.title: Is the Paralysis of Overthinking Holding You Back from Personal Growth?
item.description: Overthinking can be both a tool for deep reflection and a barrier to personal growth.

item.title: Interview with Fares: Growing Up Bahá'í and Gay in Iran
item.description: An intimate conversation with Fares reveals the profound challenges of being a gay Bahá'í in Iran, highlighting the intersectional discrimination faced by LGBTQ+ individuals in a country where both their faith and sexuality are persecuted.

item.title: How Does Grindr's Public Status Affect the Future of Digital Intimacy?
item.description: Grindr going public highlights concerns about turning intimacy into business and shifting focus from user experience to shareholder satisfaction.

item.title: Do Circuit Parties Offer a Sense of Community or Just Fleeting Moments?
item.description: After a hiatus from the circuit party scene, revisiting this familiar territory led to reflections on community, connection, and self-discovery.

item.title: Fake Pics, Real Lessons: Understanding a Gay Catfishing Past
item.description: A candid and humorous look back at the awkward stumbles of exploring one's sexuality in the early internet age - with insight into why some turn to catfishing.

item.title: From Heritage to Pride Month: Celebrating Asian and LGBTQ+ Identities
item.description: Celebrating Asian and LGBTQ+ identities as we transition from AAPI Heritage Month to Pride Month.

item.title: Is It Normal to Feel Like a Walking Contradiction?
item.description: Exploring the paradoxes within, understanding why one can be both needy and independent, and seeking balance in life and relationships.

item.title: Navigating Difficult Client Relationships: When to Say No
item.description: Balancing client demands with business integrity is challenging. Here's how Up High Studio handles difficult clients and when it's best to part ways.

item.title: Are There Truly Gay Third Spaces to Find Genuine Connection?
item.description: Exploring the lack of dedicated 3rd spaces for gay individuals and the maddening cycle of seeking connection through apps like Grindr.

item.title: Lost in Thought This Mother's Day
item.description: On Mother's Day, there's a mix of gratitude for family and a restless want for the vibrant life left behind in the city.

item.title: Who Decides Our Worth: Can the Gay Asian Community Overcome External Stereotypes?
item.description: An introspective look at overcoming societal biases and internal struggles within the gay Asian community, inspired by personal experiences and TikToker Kevo.

item.title: Is This Really What We Signed Up For, America?
item.description: As America moves forward, there's a growing sense of unease about our future direction.

item.title: Is TikTok Facing Its Last Dance in the U.S.?
item.description: Learn how TikTok became a vital part of daily life during the pandemic and examining the potential impact of its possible ban on users and the broader digital landscape.

item.title: The Eulogy Unspoken: Remembering My Dadu
item.description: In a world paused by a pandemic, there is reflection on the profound quiet left in the wake of a dad's passing—sharing the eulogy that was never delivered.

item.title: Can You Learn to Love Polyamorously?
item.description: Explore the nuances of polyamory through personal experience and the limits of love's expansiveness in the world of multiple partners.

item.title: Why Do Some Cis Gay Men Hesitate to Support Trans People?
item.description: Explore why certain cis gay men hold back from supporting the trans community.

item.title: Is Workplace Equality Real or Just a Buzzword?
item.description: A revealing inside look at a toxic workplace exposes the harsh realities of discrimination that minorities, women and others face, highlighting the critical need for true equality and respect in professional environments.

item.title: Is It Really About Being Gay, or Is It Something Deeper?
item.description: Unpack a story that goes beyond being gay, digging into how society's rules about gender and identity really affect us all.

item.title: Finding a Place to Call Home...
item.description: A gay's experience through the Midwest reveals an unexpected sense of belonging in Columbus, OH, highlighting the minority experience.

item.title: Behind DE's Smile Lies a Story of Deception and Discovery
item.description: Reflecting on 16 years: A story of trust, manipulation, and cultural complexities, as lived by a group of friends at Wayne State University.

item.title: Celebrating Naw Ruz - A Story of Tradition, Memories, and Renewal
item.description: Explore the Persian tradition of Naw Ruz, from vibrant community celebrations to intimate reflections on renewal and memory, honoring the past while embracing new beginnings.

item.title: The Transition from Party Animal to...Something Else?
item.description: Transitioning from the vibrant nightlife of your 20s to a more subdued social life in your 30s can be a perplexing journey.

item.title: A Campy Tale of Sunday Scaries
item.description: Explore that kind of anxiety that sets in before the workweek through campy analogies.

item.title: 17 Challenges of LGBTQ+ Dating as a Minority
item.description: Navigating the complexities of dating as an LGBTQ+ individual with intersecting minority identities.

item.title: Exploring Intersectionality within the LGBTQ+ Community
item.description: The journey of a Filipino-Iranian gay man highlighting the importance of building an inclusive LGBTQ+ community.

item.title: Fasting and Faith: A Spiritual Journey Across Traditions
item.description: Exploring the Bahá'í fast period teaches profound lessons about community bonds, self-discipline, and the essence of empathy that can guide one's spiritual journey.

item.title: Debugging Life Lessons for a Code-Inspired Existence
item.description: Understand how common coding dilemmas mirror real-life challenges and explore practical solutions to navigate the complexities of both worlds.

item.title: Navigating the 2024 Tech Job Market
item.description: Discover how networking, skill development, and avant-garde approaches can guide you to your next opportunity.

item.title: From Digital Agency to Cultural Advocacy?
item.description: Exploring the vibrant intersection of personal passions, cultural identity, and professional aspirations.

item.title: Navigating Future Careers in an AI-Driven World
item.description: Reflecting on the future of work amidst tech layoffs, economic uncertainties, and the widening wealth gap.

item.title: The Whirlwind of Millennial Existence
item.description: A guide through the whirlwinds of existential uncertainty, introspection, and the embrace of life's darker recesses that make the human experience beautifully messy.
